title: Farm It
description: Make farming the driving force in your world with this vanilla style farming mod that will increase yields and help you to automate your garden.
body:
A stand-alone farming mod that add many new items and blocks that extend vanilla farming. New crops, new tools, new ways to farm, whether you enjoy automating or building a homestead experience this will assist you in your goals.

 

Crops:

New crops and foods such as: Radish, Tomato, Grape 
New ways to farm; automatic crops
New types of crops; Vine crops
New tools: Knife
 

Automatic Crops:

Will harvest themselves when they reach maturity
Require a gold ingot and a redstone dust to turn the regular seed into an automatic seed
Crop no longer drops seeds as the process of adding biotic enhancements left the plant damaged.
You can get the crop back in seed form by manually breaking the crop
 

Coming Soon:

 

Vine Crops:

Grows the same as jungle vines but bears fruits such as tomatoes and grapes 
This crop does not drop its own seeds when harvested, the seeds are instead extracted from the fruits with a knife, with higher tiers of knife determining the quantity of seeds extracted. 
 

Custom crop generation:

Tomatoes, Radish and Grapes spawning naturally in the overworld
Crafting recipes to automate these new crops
 

Irrigation:

Water Tank
Big Bucket (holds 4x buckets of water)
 

New Tools

Scythe (Harvest all harvestable crops in 5x5 radius)
Sickle (Harvest and replace seed for that crop immediately)
Trowel (Plant seeds in a 5x5 radius on farmland)
Knife (Strip auto seeds of their redstone and gold (returns  the standard seed and half of the gold and redstone  required to craft), Clone plants (have a 80/20 chance  to either get a free seed (80) or destroy the crop (20))) - Currently this item exists but can only be used in the same way that a sword would be used
 

Personal Storage:

Seed Case (Hold 9 different types of seeds stacking infinitely)
Basket (Hold 9 different types of crops stacking infinitely)
 

Trees:

Fruit Trees
Tea
Treesap
Rubber
Dyed Rubber
 

Drinks

Fruit juice (also refills a small amount of hunger when player drinks)
